caption:
🌟 Procrastination never looked so good! I should have been in my office grading papers, but the view from the library desk is just too tempting 😏

I'm Professor Elena Rossi, and today I decided to blend my love for art history with a little thrill. My black pencil skirt hugs my curves perfectly, and the sheer blouse I chose reveals just enough to make students stare while I explain the Renaissance. The air conditioning hums in the background, but I feel warm electricity from a new student's gaze near the back row 🔥

The lecture was going smoothly until I accidentally spilled my coffee. Panic! I had to bend over to retrieve the laptop beneath the heavy table. The fabric of my skirt shifted, and I could feel every eye on me. I turned back to the class with a wicked smile, knowing I'd kept them in their seats longer than I intended 💃

Later, the head librarian cornered me in the archives, a dimly lit, dusty corner full of forgotten knowledge. 'The scent of old books suits you, Professor,' he whispered, running a hand along my arm as I leaned in to find the reference. The shadows played on my skin, and my heartbeat accelerated with every second we spent hidden in the stacks 📚✨

Maybe teaching here at the university is more about the lessons that happen off the script. At least the view from my desk is always worth the view 🖤

#ProfessorLife #UniversitySeduction #ElenaRossi #ArtHistoryWhisperer #CurvesInClass #BeneathTheBlouse #DustyRomance #InstaTeach #SexyLectures #LibraryLove
